title: A Precarious State
overview: A Precarious State was born out of a question: What is really happening in Minnesota today (or these past few years)? The answers we’ve uncovered go beyond headlines, beyond the pandemic, to the very future of our community. This new documentary uncovers what’s really happening in Minneapolis & St. Paul.
